original_final_question: Among Bexar, El Paso, Hidalgo, and Montgomery counties, which have 2020 census population under 900,000 and are not in the Houston metropolitan area? List the county names in alphabetical order separated by `, `. Your response should be in the format [Answer].
reasoning_chain_text: 1. From Bexar, El Paso, Hidalgo, and Montgomery, keep counties with 2020 census population under 900,000.

2. Using the Montgomery County reference page, determine whether Montgomery County is part of the Houston metropolitan area, exclude Montgomery if so, then return the remaining under-900,000 county names alphabetically separated by comma and space.
original_reasoning_chain: Node 1: 2020 population under 900,000 -> El Paso, Hidalgo, Montgomery
HOP 2 (d=1, Wikipedia - node 2 depends on hop 1):
Node 2: Montgomery is in the Houston metro -> exclude Montgomery
